description: Forward-compat tolerance vector: the same issue row carrying columns a client may not model locally (`due_time`/`end_time` — real server columns some clients deliberately exclude; `some_future_column` — a column no build has heard of) plus an object-valued known column (`description` as the pre-GFM `{text}` shape). The protocol layer must surface all keys verbatim; the apply layer must tolerate-and-drop unknown columns (an unfiltered INSERT carrying an unknown column would roll back every batch and wedge the shape) and must never crash on a non-scalar value.
